skills.name: Clear Safely
skills.summary: game=twenty_forty_eight | skill=Clear Safely | effects=clear_completed | context=use when needing to open space with safe merges while preserving the anchored high tile and keeping rows flexible
skills.description: Use this when the board is mostly stable and your highest tile is anchored in a corner: make the safe sweep move that clears a matched pair without breaking your snake/monotonic order. It opens space

skills.name: Merge Matching Tiles
skills.summary: game=twenty_forty_eight | skill=Merge Matching Tiles | effects=merge_completed, tag_merge | context=use when adjacent equal tiles can be combined while keeping the board consolidated around an anchored corner tile
skills.description: Slide the board so two tiles with the same number collide and combine into one higher-value tile, like 2+2=4. Use this whenever matching tiles can merge, especially early on to create space and grow y

skills.name: Anchor High Tile
skills.summary: game=twenty_forty_eight | skill=Anchor High Tile | effects=position_completed | context=use when positioning to keep the largest tile fixed in a corner, shift left to preserve open space, align small equal tiles, and set up safe early merges
skills.description: Keep your highest tile locked in one corner (usually a bottom corner) and avoid moves that pull it away. Use this from the opening onward so lower tiles can stack beside it in descending order for saf

skills.name: Stabilize Corner Stack
skills.summary: game=twenty_forty_eight | skill=Stabilize Corner Stack | effects=setup_completed | context=use during setup to keep the highest tile cornered, preserve empty cells, compress safely, and align near-term merges without breaking the anchor
skills.description: Keep your highest tile locked in a corner and build a descending row/column next to it (e.g., 32-16-8-4), using only the two “safe” directions that preserve that corner. Use this once your corner is e

skills.name: Preserve Anchor Space
skills.summary: game=twenty_forty_eight | skill=Preserve Anchor Space | effects=survive_completed | context=use when board space is tight to keep the highest tile anchored in a corner, preserve empty cells near it, and force safe merges to avoid lockup
skills.description: Keep one corner as your permanent home for the largest tile and preserve an adjacent empty “anchor” cell so the top row/column stays stable. Use this in mid-to-late game, especially when the board is
